title: Lines Written Extempore On Mr. Harley's Being Stabbed, And Addressed To His Physician, 1710-11 [1]
content:
On Britain Europe's safety lies,
    Britain is lost if Harley dies:
    Harley depends upon your skill:
    Think what you save, or what you kill.
meaning:
Jonathan Swift's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Lines Written Extempore On Mr. Harley's Being Stabbed, And Addressed To His Physician, 1710-11 [1]"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
